Name: Mualani
Desc: A well-known guide in Natlan who owns a watersports shop, and expert in all forms of wave-chasing.

CharaInfo.Title: Splish-Splash Wavechaser
CharaInfo.Detail: A well-known guide in Natlan who owns a watersports shop, and expert in all forms of wave-chasing.

Costume.Name: Flying Fish, Heat Waves, and Moon Scallop
Costume.Desc: Mualani's outfit. She originally intended to stick the designs of all the fish ever as ornaments for her clothes, but this design was politely rejected by the tailor on account of being too avant-garde. Despite the immense simplification, this outfit has more than enough personality to mark the enthusiastic guide out even in a crowd.

Skills.Name: Normal Attack: Cooling Treatment
Skills.Desc:
<color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>
Performs up to 3 attacks that deal <color=#80C0FFFF>Hydro DMG</color>.

<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>
Consumes a certain amount of Stamina to smack a Pufferball into the air that deals <color=#80C0FFFF>AoE Hydro DMG</color> upon landing.

<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>
Gathers the power of Hydro and plunges towards the ground from mid-air, damaging all opponents in her path. Deals <color=#80C0FFFF>AoE Hydro DMG</color> upon impact with the ground.

Skills.Name: Surfshark Wavebreaker
Skills.Desc: Combining her knowledge of speed control and the tides, Mualani can surf at any place, at any time. After using this skill, Mualani will gain 60 Nightsoul points and enter the Nightsoul's Blessing state. Nightsoul's Blessing: Mualani Continuously consume Nightsoul points. When they are depleted or when the skill is used again, Mualani's Nightsoul's Blessing will end. The state itself has the following traits: ·Mounts the Sharky Surfboard, increasing Mualani's Movement SPD. Mualani can move on water and in liquid Phlogiston while this state is active, and she will take no DMG from the latter. ·Normal Attacks will be converted to Sharky's Bites, dealing Hydro DMG based on Mualani's Max HP with the Nightsoul attribute. Sharky's Bites can take place in mid-air. DMG dealt this way is considered Normal Attack DMG. ·When she makes contact with opponents in this state, Mualani applies "Marked as Prey" to them and gains 1 Wave Momentum stack. Max 3 stacks. 1 stack can be gained every 0.7s per opponent. Wave Momentum and Marked as Prey When Mualani uses Sharky's Bite, her DMG dealt increases based on Wave Momentum stacks. When she has 3 stacks, a Normal Attack will use Sharky's Surging Bite instead, further increasing her DMG and canceling all stacks thereafter. When Shark Bite hits opponents Marked as Prey, that mark is removed, and she will fire Shark Missiles at up to 5 nearby opponents Marked as Prey, dealing DMG to them equal to this Sharky's Bite instance and clearing their Marks. If more than 1 opponent is the target of Sharky's Bite and Shark Missiles, the DMG dealt will decrease, with 28% being the maximum decrease when at least 3 opponents are targeted. First off, Sharky is a freshwater shark on top of being a surfboard. Second, it doesn't truly need to eat, but it definitely will bite.

Skills.Name: Stormburst Shot
Skills.Desc: Fires a Super Shark Missile that can track opponents, dealing AoE Hydro DMG based on Mualani's Max HP.\n\nMualani named the Shark Missiles as such because of the combined water-fire associations, which makes the term most hot spring-ish.

Passives.Name: Heat-Resistant Freshwater Puffer
Passives.Desc: When Sharky's Surging Bite hits an opponent, it will generate a Puffer nearby. Mualani will restore 35 Nightsoul points when she picks up a Puffer she has created. Only 1 such Puffer can be created in this way during a single use of Nightsoul's Blessing.

Passives.Name: Natlan's Greatest Guide
Passives.Desc: When a nearby party member triggers a Nightsoul Burst, Mualani will gain 1 stack of Wavechaser's Exploits, which lasts for 20s. Max 3 stacks. When she uses <color=#FFD780FF>Stormburst Shot</color>, Mualani will clear all such stacks and increase the DMG of this Stormburst Shot by 20%/30%/40% of her Max HP.

Passives.Name: Night Realm's Gift: Crests and Troughs
Passives.Desc:
After her Nightsoul points are depleted, Mualani can switch to consuming Phlogiston to maintain her Nightsoul's Blessing.
While in an area with Phlogiston Mechanics within Natlan, she can use Nightsoul Transmission: Mualani. When the active character is currently sprinting, swimming, in a movement mode caused by certain Talents, or at a certain height in the air, the following will trigger when switching to Mualani: Mualani will enter the Nightsoul's Blessing state and gain 40 Nightsoul points. She can trigger Nightsoul Transmission every 10s.

Additionally, Mualani's Nightsoul point or Phlogiston consumption while moving on water and Liquid Phlogiston during Nightsoul's Blessing is decreased by 75% while in Natlan, and by 35% when doing the same outside Natlan.

Passives.Name: The Trick is to Keep Smiling!
Passives.Desc: While in an area with Phlogiston Mechanics within Natlan, 15 Phlogiston can be restored when interacting with some harvestable items. Additionally, the location of items <color=#FFD780FF>unique to Natlan</color> will appear on your mini-map.

Constellations.Name: The Leisurely "Meztli"...
Constellations.Desc: Mualani's Nightsoul point and Phlogiston consumption in Nightsoul's Blessing is decreased by 30% while not in combat.\nAdditionally, the DMG of the first Sharky's Surging Bite she performs once she enters Nightsoul's Blessing and the Shark Missiles this Bite triggers is increased by an amount equal to 60% of her Max HP. This DMG is subject to the DMG decrease rules imposed by <color=#FFD780FF>Surfshark Wavebreaker</color>.

Constellations.Name: Mualani, Going All Out!
Constellations.Desc: Mualani gains 2 of <color=#FFD780FF>Surfshark Wavebreaker</color>'s Wave Momentum stacks when she enters Nightsoul's Blessing. She will gain 1 stack when obtaining a Puffer.\nAdditionally, aside from pre-existing Nightsoul point regeneration, Mualani will also restore 25 Nightsoul points over 5s after she obtains a Puffer.\nMust first unlock the Passive Talent "Heat-Resistant Freshwater Puffer."

Constellations.Name: Surfing Atop Joyous Seas
Constellations.Desc: Increases the Level of <color=#FFD780FF>Surfshark Wavebreaker</color> by 3.\nMaximum upgrade level is 15.

Constellations.Name: Sharky Eats Puffies
Constellations.Desc: Mualani regenerates 15 Energy when obtaining a Puffer. Must first unlock the Passive Talent "Heat-Resistant Freshwater Puffer."\nAdditionally, <color=#FFD780FF>Stormburst Shot</color> deals 75% increased DMG.

Constellations.Name: Same Style of Surfboard on Sale!
Constellations.Desc: Increases the Level of <color=#FFD780FF>Stormburst Shot</color> by 3.\nMaximum upgrade level is 15.

Constellations.Name: Spirit of the Springs' People
Constellations.Desc: The DMG increase from the Constellation "The Leisurely 'Meztli'..." is no longer limited to being triggered once every Nightsoul's Blessing.
